news.title: Apple Delays Siri AI Rollout in EU Following Regulatory Compliance Challenges (AAPL)
news.summary: Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) will not introduce its new Siri artificial intelligence features in the European Union after failing to satisfy interoperability requirements under the bloc’s regulatory framework, according to comments made Tuesday by a European Commission spokesperson. Speaking to reporters in Brussels, Thomas Regnier said the decision to keep the product out of the EU market was made by Apple itself.

news.title: OpenAI’s Spending Spree Is Pushing Its IPO. Inside a High-Risk Tech Debut.
news.summary: OpenAI announced it has confidentially filed for an initial public offering one week after competitor Anthropic announced it planned to go to market.  The ChatGPT parent said in a blog post on Monday night that it has recently submitted a confidential S-1 to the Securities and Exchange Commission.  “We expect it to leak so we’re just announcing it,” the company said in the blog post.
